title: senecio johnstonii var. adnivalis
intro: Senecio johnstonii var. adnivalis, also known as Adnival Senecio or Mountain Ragwort, is a plant species within the Senecio genus. It is used in traditional medicine due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's medicinal properties help in reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and easing congestion, providing relief from various respiratory conditions. Senecio johnstonii var. adnivalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
